philippines.title: Gilas 3x3 gets lift as Malick Diouf, Elizabeth Means gain PH passports
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines—The Gilas Pilipinas 3×3 program received a major boost Wednesday after Malick Diouf and Beth Means secured their Philippine passports. The Samahang Basketbol ng Pilipinas (SBP) announced the development in a Facebook post, making Diouf and Means eligible to reinforce the national 3×3 teams. READ: Gilas prospects Malick Diouf, Elizabeth Means gain PH citizenship “Filipinos, finally! Malick Diouf and Beth have secured their Philippine passports and are now officially Filipino citizens,” wrote the SBP. “This is an important step in the right direction for Gilas Pilipinas 3×3.” Diouf made waves in Philippine basketball a few years back when he […]...
Keep on reading: Gilas 3x3 gets lift as Malick Diouf, Elizabeth Means gain PH passports

philippines.title: Catriona Gray amplifies urgent need for clean water access in PH communities
philippines.description:
Catriona Gray is continuing her advocacy for clean-water access across the Philippines through ongoing field missions and disaster-response efforts. During a gathering held in Makati City on Tuesday, June 30, Gray spoke about her continued commitment to the cause as she is officially named as the new ambassador of Waves for Water Philippines. Waves for Water Philippines is a global humanitarian aid organization implementing clean water solutions in remote communities.  “Having the role gives me immense pride, not only because I believe in the work that is being done, but because of the mission and the vision to create change […]...
Keep on reading: Catriona Gray amplifies urgent need for clean water access in PH communities

philippines.title: Authorities collar 3 suspects, seize P14M shabu in Zamboanga Sibugay
philippines.description:
PAGADIAN CITY, Zamboanga del Sur — Two separate anti-illegal drug operations in Zamboanga Sibugay on Tuesday led to the arrest of three suspects and the seizure of about P4 million worth of suspected shabu, the police reported. At around 9:03 p.m. on June 30, operatives of the Regional Drug Enforcement Unit-9 (PDEA-9), backed by multiple law enforcement units, conducted a buy-bust operation at Purok 1, Barangay Lower Tungawan, Tungawan town. Two men, both residents of Zamboanga City, were arrested. In a statement, PDEA-9 said that operatives recovered eleven heat-sealed transparent plastic sachets containing crystalline substances believed to be shabu, weighing […]...
Keep on reading: Authorities collar 3 suspects, seize P14M shabu in Zamboanga Sibugay

energy.title: KKR and SK Launch South Korea’s Largest Renewable Energy Platform
energy.description: Global investment firm KKR and South Korea’s industrial conglomerate SK Inc are launching the single biggest renewable energy platform in South Korea to help meet growing power demand from AI and chip manufacturing. KKR and SK Inc are creating the platform, valued at about $1.3 billion, or 2 trillion South Korean won, to combine 1.7 gigawatts (GW) of clean energy capacity in operation and a pipeline of projects in development that would boost the platform’s total capacity to 10 GW, the investment firm said in a statement.  The…

energy.title: Goldman Sachs Warns Oil Inventory Rebuild Won’t Prevent 2027 Supply Glut
energy.description: The coming global race to rebuild depleted oil inventories will not be enough to offset a massive glut that’s coming to the market next year, as traffic through the Strait of Hormuz appears to be headed toward normalization, according to Goldman Sachs.   Stockpiles of crude and refined petroleum products in many parts of the world have been depleted to multi-decade lows after governments raced to release strategic stockpiles in March after the Middle East crisis trapped millions of barrels of daily crude and product flows in the Persian…
